title: VehicleMemBench: An Executable Benchmark for Multi-User Long-Term Memory in In-Vehicle Agents
summary: A new benchmark for evaluating in-vehicle agents' long-term memory and decision-making capabilities.
long: VehicleMemBench evaluates tool use and memory by comparing the post-action environment state with a predefined target state. The benchmark includes 23 tool modules and each sample contains over 80 historical memory events.
short: A new benchmark for in-vehicle agents' long-term memory.
tweet: Introducing VehicleMemBench, a benchmark for in-vehicle agents' long-term memory and decision-making capabilities! #AI #MachineLearning
xiaohongshu: 你知道吗？我们刚刚推出了VehicleMemBench，一个专为车载智能助手设计的长期记忆评估标准！

title: Learning-guided Prioritized Planning for Lifelong Multi-Agent Path Finding in Warehouse Automation
summary: A new framework for lifelong multi-agent path finding in warehouse automation, combining reinforcement learning with prioritized planning.
long: RL-RH-PP integrates classical Prioritized Planning with a learning-based priority assignment policy. It formulates dynamic priority assignment as a POMDP and uses an attention-based neural network to decode priority orders on-the-fly.
short: A new framework for lifelong multi-agent path finding in warehouse automation.
tweet: Introducing RL-RH-PP, a new framework for lifelong multi-agent path finding in warehouse automation! #AI #MachineLearning
xiaohongshu: 你知道吗？我们刚刚推出了RL-RH-PP，一个专为仓储自动化设计的长期多智能代理路径规划框架！

title: Efficient Benchmarking of AI Agents
summary: A new protocol for efficient benchmarking of AI agents, reducing the number of evaluation tasks by 44-70% while maintaining high rank fidelity.
long: The mid-range difficulty filter, motivated by Item Response Theory, reduces the number of evaluation tasks by 44-70% while maintaining high rank fidelity under scaffold and temporal shifts.
short: A new protocol for efficient benchmarking of AI agents.
tweet: Introducing a new protocol for efficient benchmarking of AI agents! #AI #MachineLearning
xiaohongshu: 你知道吗？我们刚刚推出了一个新的AI代理评估协议，能减少评估任务数量40-70%！

title: LLMs Do Not Grade Essays Like Humans
summary: A study on the agreement between LLM-generated scores and human grades, showing that LLMs tend to assign higher scores to short or underdeveloped essays.
long: The study evaluates the grading behavior of several models from the GPT and Llama families in an out-of-the-box setting, without task-specific training.
short: LLMs do not grade essays like humans.
tweet: New study: LLMs do not grade essays like humans! #AI #MachineLearning
xiaohongshu: 你知道吗？我们刚刚发布了一项研究，发现LLMs不能像人类一样评估作业！

title: Grounding Vision and Language to 3D Masks for Long-Horizon Box Rearrangement
summary: A new approach for long-horizon planning in 3D environments, using 3D vision-language models to ground natural-language referents to 3D segmentation masks.
long: The approach formulates long-horizon planning as sequential reactive prediction of paired 3D masks: a "which-object" mask indicating what to pick and a "which-target-region" mask specifying where to place it.
short: A new approach for long-horizon planning in 3D environments.
tweet: Introducing a new approach for long-horizon planning in 3D environments! #AI #MachineLearning
xiaohongshu: 你知道吗？我们刚刚推出了一个新方法，专为3D环境长期规划设计！

title: Can LLM Agents Be CFOs? A Benchmark for Resource Allocation in Dynamic Enterprise Environments
summary: A new benchmark for evaluating LLM agents' resource allocation capabilities in dynamic enterprise environments.
long: The EnterpriseArena benchmark instantiates CFO-style decision-making in a 132-month enterprise simulator, combining firm-level financial data, anonymized business documents, macroeconomic and industry signals, and expert-validated operating rules.
short: A new benchmark for LLM agents' resource allocation capabilities.
tweet: Introducing a new benchmark for LLM agents' resource allocation capabilities! #AI #MachineLearning
xiaohongshu: 你知道吗？我们刚刚推出了一个新的LLM代理资源分配评估标准！

title: Evaluating a Multi-Agent Voice-Enabled Smart Speaker for Care Homes: A Safety-Focused Framework
summary: A new safety-focused evaluation framework for a voice-enabled smart speaker designed to support everyday activities in residential care homes.
long: The framework examines the system end-to-end, combining Whisper-based speech recognition with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) approaches (hybrid, sparse, and dense).
short: A new safety-focused evaluation framework for a voice-enabled smart speaker.
tweet: Introducing a new safety-focused evaluation framework for a voice-enabled smart speaker! #AI #MachineLearning
xiaohongshu: 你知道吗？我们刚刚推出了一个新的安全评估框架，专为护理院智能助手设计！

title: PLDR-LLMs Reason At Self-Organized Criticality
summary: A study on the reasoning capabilities of PLDR-LLMs pretrained at self-organized criticality, showing that they exhibit reasoning at inference time.
long: The study shows that the characteristics of PLDR-LLM deductive outputs at criticality are similar to second-order phase transitions.
tweet: New study: PLDR-LLMs reason at self-organized criticality! #AI #MachineLearning
xiaohongshu: 你知道吗？我们刚刚发布了一项研究，发现PLDR-LLMs在自组织临界点时具有推理能力！

title: Shape, Symmetries, and Structure: The Changing Role of Mathematics in Machine Learning Research
summary: A study on the role of mathematics in modern machine learning research, showing that carefully designed and mathematically principled architectures result in only marginal improvements.
long: The study examines the shift in how progress is made in machine learning, from carefully designed and mathematically principled architectures to compute-intensive and engineering-first efforts.
short: Mathematics plays a changing role in machine learning research.
tweet: New study: Mathematics plays a changing role in machine learning research! #AI #MachineLearning
xiaohongshu: 你知道吗？我们刚刚发布了一项研究，发现数学在机器学习研究中的作用正在发生变化！
